description: The company has received a shipment from 'DemoSupplier' and needs to record a purchase invoice. Log into Apache OFBiz (admin / ofbiz) and navigate to the Accounting module. Create a new Purchase Invoice with 'DemoSupplier' as the vendor (Party From). Add two invoice items: 20 units of 'Round Gizmo' (GZ-2644) at $38.40 each and 12 units of 'Powered Gizmo' (GZ-8544) at $12.95 each. Set the invoice date to today. After entering all items, set the invoice status to 'Approved'. The task is complete when the purchase invoice is visible in Approved status.
